This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] pushState serializes state before checking the rate limit
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "SecurityError: Failed to execute 'pushState' on 'History': Throttling history state changes to prevent the browser from hanging."
[FAIL] pushState parses the URL before checking the rate limit
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "SecurityError: Failed to execute 'pushState' on 'History': Throttling history state changes to prevent the browser from hanging."
[FAIL] pushState checks whether the URL can be rewritten before checking the rate limit
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "SecurityError: Failed to execute 'pushState' on 'History': Throttling history state changes to prevent the browser from hanging."
Harness: the test ran to completion.
